{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Overlord-level sword
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sword Sage]]'s collection contains an [[Overlord-level sword]] made of condensed venom [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
